note: Secondary damage effects that can roll on Fine or better quality weapons (5% base chance unless otherwise stated). Also includes always-on effects from specific materials and weapon types.

roll_rules.note: Secondary effects roll at 5% for Fine and above. Some materials and weapon archetypes always carry specific effects regardless of quality (see always_on_effects in weapon_materials.json).
roll_rules.critical_strike_chance: Max dice roll on attacker's attack roll. Doubles all damage for that hit.

secondary_effects.name: Rupturing
secondary_effects.trigger: Rolled secondary on successful Blunt hit (especially large blunt force impacts). 5% roll on Fine+ weapons.
secondary_effects.effect: Internal tearing damage. Incurable during battle. Has a 10% chance of causing death at the end of the battle if still active.
secondary_effects.common_source: 2H blunt force weapons and large monster strikes
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Rupturing — Internal damage; 10% death chance at battle end if untreated.

secondary_effects.name: Bleeding
secondary_effects.trigger: Can trigger from any Slashing damage. 5% roll on Fine+ weapons. Northern Iron always triggers on slash/pierce.
secondary_effects.effect: Lingering HP damage per turn for the remainder of the battle. Also reduces the bleeding target's initiative by 10%.
secondary_effects.damage_per_turn: Scaled to 5–15% of the hit that caused it
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Bleeding — Lingering damage over time. Target initiative -10%.

secondary_effects.name: Concussion
secondary_effects.trigger: Common from 2H blunt force weapons. 5% roll on Fine+ weapons. Ilithium material triggers at 50% chance.
secondary_effects.effect: Target loses all initiative for two full turns.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Concussion — Target loses all initiative for 2 turns.

secondary_effects.name: Staggering
secondary_effects.trigger: Common from any 2H weapon. 5% roll on Fine+ 2H weapons.
secondary_effects.effect: Target is pushed back 1 hex on the battle map and loses all initiative for the current turn.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Staggering — Target pushed back 1 hex, loses initiative this turn.

secondary_effects.name: Secondary Strike
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% roll on Fine+ small slashing or piercing weapons (knives, daggers, smaller blades, 1H spears). Heartwood Ironwood bow at 10%.
secondary_effects.effect: Double damage on that hit. The wielder found a gap in the enemy's guard.
secondary_effects.common_source: Small daggers, knives, short spears, Heartwood Ironwood bows
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Secondary Strike — Double damage this hit.

secondary_effects.name: Extra Painful Strike
secondary_effects.trigger: Can happen to any weapon on any hit. 5% roll on Fine+. Arcanium material triggers at 50%.
secondary_effects.effect: Target loses 25% of their initiative pool for the next turn.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Extra Painful Strike — Target loses 25% initiative next turn.

secondary_effects.name: Cascade Effect
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% chance on any spell. Not a weapon secondary effect — applies to magical/spell attacks only.
secondary_effects.effect: Effect jumps to a random additional target on the battlefield (friend or foe), dealing 25% of the original damage to that target.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Cascade — Jumps to random secondary target for 25% damage.

secondary_effects.name: Critical Strike
secondary_effects.trigger: Attacker rolls maximum on their attack dice. Applies to any attack, physical or magical.
secondary_effects.common_source: Any attack. Thrown weapons always crit when thrown.

secondary_effects.name: Thorns
secondary_effects.trigger: Rare Wooden weapons (5% roll). Common on Oakspeople-crafted items.
secondary_effects.effect_on_weapon: Successful hits cause minor Bleed AND minor Extra Painful Strike on the target.
secondary_effects.effect_on_armor: Successful hits against the wearer cause a 25% chance to apply a 1-turn Stagger to the attacker.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Thorns — Hits cause minor Bleed + Extra Painful Strike (weapon) / Stagger attacker 25% (armor).

secondary_effects.name: Venomous
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% roll on Fine+ weapons. Dark Steel always carries this. Rare Bone weapons may carry Poisonous instead.
secondary_effects.effect: Injected toxin delivered on a piercing or slashing hit. Degrades Metabolism and Vigor over time. No effect on undead or constructs.
secondary_effects.damage_per_turn: 3–8% Metabolism/Vigor reduction per turn for 3 turns
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Venomous — Degrades Metabolism and Vigor for 3 turns. Stacks x3.

secondary_effects.name: Poisonous
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% roll on Fine+ weapons. Rare Bone weapons may carry this.
secondary_effects.effect: Ingested or contact-delivered toxin. Penalises Cognition rolls and causes slow Vitality degradation.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Poisonous — Cognition penalty + slow Vitality drain over 5 turns.

secondary_effects.name: Organia
secondary_effects.trigger: Rare Wooden weapons always carry this as secondary damage alongside base Blunt physical.
secondary_effects.effect: Nature damage that hurts all living things directly and strongly. Chaotic life force energy.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Organia — Nature/life damage. Hurts all living targets.

secondary_effects.name: Blessed Materium
secondary_effects.trigger: Ancient Steel material always carries this. Very rarely found on other magical weapons.
secondary_effects.effect: Holy-infused physical damage. Bypasses all physical resistance. Cannot be regenerated by dark arts healing for 2 turns.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Blessed Materium — Bypasses physical resistance. Blocks dark arts healing 2 turns.

secondary_effects.name: Impact
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% roll on Fine+ rare magical 2H blunt force weapons.
secondary_effects.effect: Pure invisible force damage. Works on incorporeal beings unlike mundane blunt. No immunity exceptions.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Impact — Force damage. Affects incorporeal beings.

secondary_effects.name: Fire
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% roll on Fine+ magical weapons. Fire Arrows always carry this.
secondary_effects.effect: Burning heat. Applies Ignited status: 1d4 + caster level fire damage per turn for 3 turns or until extinguished.

secondary_effects.name: Ice
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% roll on Fine+ rare magical weapons.
secondary_effects.effect: Ice damage that pierces through creature resistances from warmer climates. Can freeze targets.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Ice — Pierces warm-climate resistances. Chance to Freeze.

secondary_effects.name: Darkvoid
secondary_effects.trigger: Voidsteel material always deals this as primary damage type. 5% roll on Shadow Arts magical weapons.
secondary_effects.effect: Unstable void energy. ±20% damage variance on every hit. Bonus damage to Materium-attuned targets.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Darkvoid — Unstable void energy. ±20% variance. Bonus vs Materium users.

secondary_effects.name: Blight
secondary_effects.trigger: 5% roll on Fine+ Shadow Arts magical weapons.
secondary_effects.effect: Supernatural rot. Physiology -5 per turn for 3 turns. Can spread to adjacent living targets on crit. Not resisted by magical Insulation — resisted only by Physiology Immunity.
secondary_effects.tooltip_text: Blight — Physiology -5/turn for 3 turns. Spreads on crit.
